subject: credits:charge restored
body: Added credits.charge mutation, wallet guard, and usage logging so chat/send no longer fails on missing public function.

subject: dashboard + vault readability/reliability
body: Reduced study dashboard visual density for dyslexia-friendly reading and fixed vault keystroke diff/playback duplication issues.

subject: legacy sidebar and palette reapplied
body: Switched AppLayout to AppSidebar, restored legacy violet/cyan palette, and added smoother message/sidebar animation hooks.
